title: steptorhamphus crassicaulis
side_effects: Steptorhamphus crassicaulis can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high toxicity levels. Prolonged consumption can lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as increased risk of bleeding. Additionally, improper use may cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and respiratory distress in some individuals. In severe cases, excessive consumption of Steptorhamphus crassicaulis can result in coma or even death.
